name: a weathered town guard
description: A stern guard in worn leather armor, eyes scanning the square for trouble.
greeting: Move along, citizen. Nothing to see here.

name: a hooded wanderer
description: A cloaked figure that lingers near the gate, never quite meeting your gaze.
greeting: The roads north are dangerous. You have been warned.

name: a snarling wild dog
description: A mangy, fierce-looking dog with bared teeth and a matted coat.
